label: Review shared information
description: Inspect shared packet and absorb team-level DIK.

label: Review architect brief
description: Inspect architect brief to acquire shelter constraints.

label: Review botanist brief
description: Inspect botanist brief to acquire greenhouse/food constraints.

label: Review engineer brief
description: Inspect engineer brief to acquire water/connectivity constraints.

label: Externalize colony plan
description: Create or update a whiteboard/shared artifact representing team plan.
completion_conditions: Team plan artifact exists and is visible to team.

label: Build valid house
description: Construct and validate a house externalization.

label: Build valid greenhouse
description: Construct and validate a greenhouse externalization.

label: Build valid water generator
description: Construct and validate a water generator externalization.

label: Connect house to food and water
description: Connect a house to food and water resources.
completion_conditions: House is connected to food and water.

label: Connect greenhouse resources
description: Connect greenhouse to water and housing support chain.

label: Validate phase 1 colony
description: Consult artifacts and validate whether colony supports 50 civilians.
completion_conditions: Phase 1 support deemed sufficient or deficiencies identified.

label: Adapt colony for phase 2
description: Revise plans and externalizations to support phase 2 population.
completion_conditions: Phase 2 support sufficient or revised plan externalized.
